Import pick adjustments
Upload adjusted CSV from picking system — short supply lines will be automatically allocated using SOH priority
📂
Drop CSV file here
or
Expected columns: Machine ID, Product, Barcode, Confirmed Qty
Short supply allocation
When confirmed qty is less than required, stock is allocated to emptiest slots first
Example: 12 confirmed, 15 needed
Slot A3 SOH=1 → gets 5 ✓
Slot A2 SOH=3 → gets 4
Slot A1 SOH=6 → gets 3
Import preview
MachineProductBarcodeRequiredConfirmedVarianceAllocation
Driver sheets
One printable A4 page per machine. Shows each lane that needs filling with current SOH, par level, and fill quantity — same as the driver app fill guide, filtered to lanes below par only.

💰 Cash bag mode
How drivers bag cash from machine collections
Each machine gets its own bag labelled with the machine ID
🪙 Coin mech float alert
Alert driver when float drops below threshold
Alert at 20%
5%25%50%
Override per machine in machine settings
💳 Payment types
Default for new machines
Override per machine in machine settings
📋 Reconciliation
Variance alert threshold
$ flag as investigate
Cash variances above this amount are flagged for investigation
📊 Margin thresholds
Controls how margin % is colour coded across products, planograms and reports
🟢 Green — healthy margin
Margin at or above this % shows green
%
🟡 Amber — watch margin
Margin at or above this % (but below green) shows amber
%
🔴 Red — low margin
Margin below amber threshold shows red
< 50%
Preview:
📱 Driver app controls
These settings are pushed to all driver devices. Drivers cannot change them.
📷 Machine photo frequency
Require a machine photo every N fills. Also triggers when prices change.
📋 SOH audit frequency
Require a full SOH stocktake every N fills. DEX data pre-fills counts where available.
🗺 Routing intelligence
Rules used to auto-flag machines and calculate route urgency
⏱ Avg fill time
10m 15 min 30m
Used to estimate route duration
📅 Max restock interval
42 days
Flag machine when approaching limit
📊 DCR window
30 days
Rolling window for daily consumption rate
🔮 Forward planning
5 days
Flag machines predicted to sell out within this window
📉 Empty threshold
25 %
Flag when this % of slots are at zero
🚫 Sold-out definition
Flag when ALL lanes of a product are empty
📊 Dynamic par levels
Automatically adjusts par levels based on actual sales data. Runs nightly at 2am. Per-machine and per-lane opt out available.
⏱ Min data days
28
Days before first adjustment
📈 Min readings
20
DEX readings required
📅 Data window
42 d
History window (4–6 weeks)
🛡 Safety buffer
20 %
Added above DCR × interval
⬇ Min par floor
3
Par never drops below this
Last run: never
🧹 Firebase maintenance
Clean up stale data from Firebase to keep things tidy
Cancelled runs
Remove cancelled runs older than 7 days
Stale pick exports
Remove pick export records older than 30 days
Fix planogram par/capacity in Firebase
Push correct par & capacity from in-memory planograms to Firebase (fixes slots showing par=10)
All cancelled runs (force)
Remove ALL cancelled runs regardless of age
☁ Firebase cloud sync
Not configured
📱 Local
Firebase config
API Key
Project ID
App ID
Database URL
Setup: Go to console.firebase.google.com → New project → Add web app → Realtime Database → Create (test mode). Paste the config values above.
🖼
Firebase Storage — product images
Upload images from the product edit panel. Stored permanently in your Firebase project.
—
Images are stored at gs://vynd-pilot.firebasestorage.app/products/{barcode}.jpg
To upload: open any product → click the image preview or ⬆ Upload button → choose a file → saves automatically.

Product families group products for commission rules, reporting, and filtering. Example: set a commission rate on "Energy Drinks" as a whole family.

📦 Product registration
All products must be registered in Mushiny iRES before they can be included in a pick order. Run this once before go-live and whenever new products are added.

Physical dimensions — required for Mushiny AMR picking

Height (m)
Barcodes
First barcode is the primary. Additional barcodes resolve to this product (e.g. different packaging, micromarket scanning aliases).
Minimum pick threshold
Only add this product to the stock pick if enough units have sold since the last fill. Prevents unnecessary picking of slow-moving lines.
%
of par
units sold
Override prekit to Par
For fresh products that always spoil within the fill cycle. When enabled, the driver picks exactly the par quantity and all current stock in the machine is automatically written off as waste.
⚠ Fresh product workflow active
Driver will be prompted to spoil all current machine stock before filling. Pick quantity will be locked to par level. Ensure life span is set above to enable date-code alerts.
